title: Vacancy for Category Manager at Cleartrip Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Category Manager at Cleartrip Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Cleartrip Ventures Solutions. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Category Manager to strengthen our Bhopal-based team.

About Cleartrip Ventures Solutions:
Cleartrip Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cleartrip Ventures Solutions!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
